item.title: Ok who knew about the squid headlights??
item.dc:creator: roaduardo

item.title: Every morning and night I send my two adult sons, their SOs, and my wife memes as a love note. Whimsical, bizarre, funny, dad jokes, advice, jams, & nightmare fuel sprinkled on top. Here’s the latest. Tell me if you want an invite to future posts. #DFTBA.
item.description:
Be silly today. I love you. Dad.
Priorities.
MAGIC!!
Dad joke hoo ha ha.
Look at them. How cute. Felt kind of whisky sending the unsolicited dik dik pic above, TBH.
Reflect! Every day. It’s one of the best habits you can choose to form.
Obligatory Maryland post
Now I know why your mom wants her Krab shredded.
But it’s a little permit crab, so just a little bad thing.
Forbidden pancakes. Make some for your mother for Mother’s Day. Regular ones. Not the forbidden ones.
I’m tempted to buy these and wear them to Red Lobster.
Nice hat.
Sit up straight.
flap flap flap flap flap it’s coming
Umm, gosh. We are frogs of action. Lies do not become us.
Forbidden guacamole ?
Forbidden shrimp cocktail
Dad joke hoo ha ha.
I love you. Good morning.
And I’m not going to start watching this crap, either.
Remember to text before coming home or else you’re going to see a WHOLE LOTTA DAD.
By the way. The neighbors all have it again.
Hang in there. We’ll get through this together.
Why?
Say it.
Good night. I love you.
Sweet dreams.
Finals week for two of you. Don’t let the pressure get too much for you. Let me know if you need anything. I’m proud of you.
Doi da doi.
Cats are evil.
Ok. Cats are NEUTRAL evil.
Ha! You’re all adults now. What’s that feeling next to your dread? Oh, it’s the limberness of your back and knees leaving. Welcome to adulthood, suckas.
Be whimsical today.
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=nBHkIWAJitg
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=nBHkIWAJitg
OoooOooOOOooooo! What’s that sound? Oh. It’s her moaning. I bet her name is Myrtle.
Get up! Have a great day! I love you.
I love you, bitches.
5005135!
Have a great day!
Boo!
Let’s face it.
Look out. He has pepper spray.
item.dc:creator: Wheretheheckisjason

item.title: Rangers want help identifying pair suspected of archeological theft in Canyonlands
item.description: "In a video recorded at the archeological site, the individuals entered a signed-as-closed area, removed artifacts from a cabinet, and handled historic harnesses in a manner that had potential to damage them," the National Park Service said. Law enforcement rangers in national parks complete training and are commissioned federal law enforcement officers. "If you were in the area of Cave Spring Cowboy Camp about 5:30 p.m. on March 23, or if you have information that could help identify the suspects, please contact investigators. Tips can be anonymous," the National Park Service said. https://www.ksl.com/article/51015949/rangers-want-help-identifying-pair-suspected-of-archeological-theft-in-canyonlands-
item.dc:creator: yokwe

item.title: When Octopuses dream...
item.description: There is evidence to suggest that octopuses might dream. Researchers have observed that octopuses undergo cycles of color changes and body movements while they sleep, which is similar to the REM (rapid eye movement) sleep associated with dreaming in humans and other animals. During these periods, an octopus might display various skin patterns and colors, suggesting that they could be experiencing dreams or some form of active brain activity while asleep. However, the exact nature of their dreams, if they indeed dream as humans do, remains a subject of scientific study and speculation.
item.dc:creator: LosPer
